reasoning: The control CM-8-b focuses on maintaining an up-to-date inventory of system components. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that all resources such as Pods and Nodes are properly labeled and annotated for inventory purposes. Additionally, scheduling periodic reviews of these labels and annotations can help maintain an accurate inventory. This aligns with the need to have a systematic approach to tracking and managing Kubernetes resources.
